committedAssetStrategy.summary: Commits static WGS84 Korea administrative rings normalized into the vector-only family map viewBox, replacing decorative hand-drawn polygons without any runtime raster layer. The asset remains decorative family navigation data, not legal-boundary coordinates.
committedAssetStrategy.licenseTreatment: 공공데이터포털 metadata for 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 lists 무료 and 이용허락범위 제한 없음; VWorld is documented as the official download surface. This app bundles simplified normalized SVG guide geometry, not raw SHP files.
committedAssetStrategy.accuracyNotice: Decorative navigation art only. Static projected boundary overlay only. Do not use for legal, survey, routing, cadastral, emergency, or address decisions.

officialFirstLevelRegionPolicy.currentException: Static overlay now uses real WGS84 province/municipality rings normalized to the vector-only viewBox; simplified and decorative only, not raw legal-boundary coordinates.

islandReferencePolicy.renderingDecision: Render Jeju/Ulleungdo/Dokdo as non-region static decorative markers/labels in the vector satellite-inspired overlay so the interactive 17+4 region polygon contract remains stable.
islandReferencePolicy.accuracyNotice: Island points are normalized visual anchors only and must not be described as legal, cadastral, survey, routing, emergency, or address coordinates.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 SHP
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: 공공데이터포털 metadata reviewed 2026-06-15 lists 무료 and 이용허락범위 제한 없음 for the SHP file data.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Approved source metadata for the G003 static boundary-guide overlay. Use build-time/static preprocessing only; no client runtime fetch.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Portal metadata describes 시도, 시군구, 읍면동 legal-boundary SHP coverage and points to a VWorld download URL. The bundled overlay is simplified normalized SVG guide geometry.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: VWorld 법정경계 SHP download surfaces
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Official download surface referenced by the 공공데이터포털 MOLIT metadata; selected datasets must remain static and no-key at app runtime.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Approved metadata/download surface for documented static Korea boundary-guide derivation.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Do not call VWorld services from the browser. Keep any geometry simplified and bundled as static app data.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: Bundled Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 country border lines
verifiedSourceCandidates.publisher: Natural Earth / nvkelso natural-earth-vector GitHub mirror
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Natural Earth describes its map data as public domain. The bundled asset extracts low-resolution line coordinates for decorative globe borders.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Committed for static, non-live, decorative country border data outside the Korea family overlay.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Render as non-pickable GlobeRenderer-owned line geometry; do not use for political/legal boundary claims.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: southkorea/southkorea-maps KOSTAT 2013 simplified GeoJSON
verifiedSourceCandidates.publisher: Lucy Park / southkorea-maps, sourced from KOSTAT census administrative geodata
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Repository README states KOSTAT data is free to share or remix; this app bundles simplified static derived rings with attribution.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Approved as a static no-key replacement for decorative hand-drawn polygons in the normalized vector-only map frame.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Use committed projected JSON only; no runtime GitHub, KOSTAT, VWorld, or map-tile calls.

excludedSources.reason: Avoid for this redistributed public/static gift app because common GADM terms restrict commercial redistribution and derivatives.
Avoid NC/ND census-boundary data when simplification/modification or public redistribution is required.
Violates the static/no-live-API requirement and adds runtime dependency risk.

attributionText: Korea family overlay: static normalized vector satellite-inspired boundary-guide visualization documented from 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 / VWorld legal-boundary metadata; includes decorative Jeju/Ulleungdo/Dokdo island references for family navigation only, no legal-boundary accuracy claim.
